name: Travel Rewards Credit Card
effective_cost: Free, with no annual fee, and no foreign transaction fees

verdict.text: Solid no-fee travel earner: flat 1.5x, no blackout dates

earn_note: A genuinely flat rate with no categories or caps. Points redeem as a statement credit against any travel purchase (flights, hotels, vacation rentals, baggage fees) and also against dining, including takeout. Enrolled BofA Rewards members get a 10–75% bonus on top of the 1.5x rate depending on combined deposit/investment balance.

redemption_options.method: Statement credit against travel or dining purchases
Deposit to a Bank of America checking or savings account, or gift cards

points.note: Value tops out around 1¢/point regardless of redemption method. There's no transfer-partner ecosystem behind this program, just a flat, no-fuss statement-credit redemption.

transfer_partners.highlight: No transfer partners: points redeem directly as a statement credit against travel/dining purchases, or for cash/gift cards.

insurance.detail: Not responsible for fraudulent transactions once reported
Not publicly documented for this card
Not publicly documented for this card
Not publicly documented for this card

protection_note: Bank of America's purchase/travel protection suite (Return Protection, Purchase Security, Auto Rental CDW, trip insurance) is only advertised on the Premium Rewards cards; it isn't published for this card.
rental_note: No auto rental coverage documented publicly for this card as of this writing.

services.name: 25,000-point welcome bonus
services.detail: After $1,000 in purchases within the first 90 days, a $250 value toward travel or dining.

services.name: 0% intro APR
services.detail: 0% on purchases and balance transfers (within 60 days) for the first 15 billing cycles, then 17.49%–27.49% variable.

services.name: Intro balance transfer fee
services.detail: 3% for the first 60 days the account is open, then 5% on all future transfers.

services.name: No foreign transaction fees
services.detail: $0 on purchases made outside the US.

services.name: BofA Rewards bonus
services.detail: 10% (Member), 25% (Preferred Plus), 50% (Preferred Honors), or 75% (Premier) bonus on points earned, based on combined Bank of America/Merrill balance.

additional_cards.title: Authorized users

benefits.text: Earns points on their spend (into your account)

additional_cards.note: No cost to add: flat-rate earning means there's no category math to coordinate across users.
